screen_metadata.name: Shop-Floor Production Dispatch Queue & Work Order Matrix

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px high-density assembly execution tracking dashboard)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Pane Operational Matrix (Left Rail Column: Real-time incoming demand queues from CRM/SCM stock triggers; Center Main Panel: Active Work Order (WO) high-density data grid tracking execution timelines; Right Sidebar Panel Drawer: Selected Work Center routing sequences tracking steps, machine resource allocations, and operator assignments sheets)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Maintains parallel tracking lanes and resource availability charts side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The left incoming demand queue collapses into an expandable slide panel to preserve wide tracking tables dimensions)

key_visible_sections.title: Work Orders Execution Master Ledger Grid

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active shop-floor manager or supervisor validation tokens -> Inherit multi-tenant data domain scopes -> Execute state payload request fetch from ManufacturingService.getWorkOrders()
user_progression_routes.on_wo_row_select: Asynchronously query internal routing sequence steps from PLM datasets caches to populate the right work center status logs sidebar without blocking browser UI threads

redirection_rules.condition: If a linked machine identifier key triggers a down-time critical breakdown alarm flag from the EAM module broker
redirection_rules.action: Force visual wrapper boundaries context elements inline to 'Machine Down - Route Suspended' and disable active dispatch control triggers buttons for affected production lanes

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action command selector link button element 'btn_initialize_production'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog confirmation window forcing multi-tier calculation checks validating raw materials availability metrics against staged parts arrays from SCM before release signatures

atoms.type: Signed Whole Integer Form Input Control Component Box
Functional Core Action Core Action Button

molecules.composition: Combines origin system tracker code (`crm_sales_order_id` / `scm_reorder_trigger_id`) + material part lookup string text line + required production units counter element + priority milestone tag indicator
Combines sequence order tracking marker number + target work center identifier badge + assigned operator metadata string + processing execution progress gauge bar

organisms.composition: High-density vertical scrolling stack mapping incoming manufacturing job triggers, handling quick criteria sorting parameters lists.

Virtualized column tracking layout grid parsing extensive production logs database records tracking properties: alphanumeric work order tokens, part IDs, quantities scheduled, target timelines, scrap counts, and inline conditional badges.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on part indexes, work order serial codes, unit counters, and step timers to shield horizontal layout grid rows alignments perfectly)

scales.work_order_large_heading: font-size: 1.25rem (20px) | font-weight: 700 | tracking: tight text-transform regular

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.mfg_running_indigo: #4F46E5 (Indigo Blue Production Line Active Operational Focus Hue Accent)
color_palette_hex.mfg_completed_teal: #10B981 (Emerald Green Fulfilled Production Target Token Indicator Line)
color_palette_hex.machine_down_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Critical Infrastructure Breakdown Alert Flash Glow Border)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard component layout box margins constraints padding unit metrics)
spacing_and_borders.matrix_row_vertical_padding: 0.5rem (8px dense layout packaging formatting parameters dividing spreadsheet lines)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Partition Separators Layout Line)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color properties transform settings focus pointer map value to #334155 using an immediate 100ms execution curves duration window parameter
transform micro-scale modifier adjustments scale adjustments down to scale 0.98 to yield structural physical haptic click confirmation looks feedback

accessibility_aria_roles.work_orders_spreadsheet_canvas: role='grid' housing multi-column extensive historical industrial assembly configurations records matrices
accessibility_aria_roles.work_center_routing_inspector: role='complementary' accompanied by explicit aria-live='polite' configuration fields monitoring real-time machine routing sequences adjustments parameters

staged_manufacturing_demand_queue.part_name: Hardened Grade-A Carbon Steel Base Plate 12x12

work_orders_records_collection.part_name: Hardened Grade-A Carbon Steel Base Plate 12x12

local_reactive_state_variables.selected_work_order_focus_id: Tracks target active work order row item lookup code token string key used to inflate routing sequence steps (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_initialization_modal_open: Boolean state variable tracking presentation configurations parameters toggling raw material verification checking wizard form overlays
local_reactive_state_variables.mfg_catalog_text_search_query: String variable tracking character text criteria filtering parameters across work order numbers arrays instantly

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application instance session multi-tenant company context parameters tracking codes configurations cross microservice runtime execution scopes
global_application_context_bindings.eam_machinery_down_event_bus: Global background subscription queue catching real-time equipment breakdown logs signals emitted from plant maintenance networks

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous module scripts deploying precise numeric conversion wrappers to shield metrics accuracy calculations tables from rounding fractional losses
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Appending incoming real-time background demand trigger cards array items models records into staged_manufacturing_demand_queue display layers must refresh interface rows maps under an execution runtime ceiling limit of 5ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Bind fetched step tracking data arrays records directly inside local work_center_routing_inspector store data collections cache views, and apply lookup keys values forward into selected_work_order_focus_id

Transmit operational processing confirmation payload packages; insert generated return work order row parameters record straight inside work_orders_records_collection local cache arrays view stores; close modal layers flags

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /manufacturing/kitting (Advances browser web layout router framework spatial navigation coordinates parameters forward into final sequence Screen MFG_SCR_002 Material-Staging & Pick Verification Canvas Viewport)
